strongest.source_title: Russian drones attacked port infrastructure in Ukraine's Odesa region: governor
strongest.reasoning: moderate source, strong historical pattern match.
strongest.signal_briefing: Feb 2022 peace talk failures preceded the invasion — markets cratered. Defense names typically rally 2-4% on renewed conflict risk. Wheat and European gas see immediate risk premium.

strongest.pair_trade_rationale: War-related route and commodity disruption can favor upstream constrained exposures and hurt downstream users.
strongest.value_chain_notes: This is a war-escalation and supply-route signal, not a generic semiconductor signal.

strongest.source_title: Goldman Sachs expects ECB to deliver two 25 bps rate hikes each in April and Jun
strongest.reasoning: moderate source, strong historical pattern match.
strongest.signal_briefing: March 2022 rate hikes crushed tech (down 30% that year). Rate hikes typically pressure growth stocks and rate-sensitive sectors. Dollar strengthens on yield differential. Bond yields climb.

instrument_candidates.reason: Higher rates can support the dollar
Long-duration bonds are pressured by rising yields
Higher discount rates pressure duration-heavy equities

strongest.pair_trade_rationale: Rates and fiscal repricing usually favor self-funded quality over financing-dependent growth exposures.
strongest.value_chain_notes: This is a macro/rates regime signal and should only map into sector chains when a more specific bottleneck is visible.
